priority_order: Implement three cuBLAS SGEMM calls: compute W@X into Y, compute B.T@X into temporary U using CUBLAS_OP_T on B, then compute A@U and accumulate into Y with beta=1
llm_advice.rationale: The baseline uses separate ATen mm and add calls, incurring kernel launch overhead. A pure cuBLAS three-SGEMM strategy reduces the number of kernel launches to three, avoids explicit transpose of B by using CUBLAS_OP_T, and accumulates the low-rank update directly into Y with beta=1, eliminating an extra add kernel. This aligns with the recommended actions from the diagnosis and is the first optimization step.
risk_controls: Ensure correctness across all d in [3584,4608]
Use leading dimensions and transpose flags correctly to avoid explicit transpose copies
Compile and run static review before promotion
stop_conditions: Exhaust viable cuBLAS-only approaches without further improvement

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
